items.title: Vingegaard takes early edge at Tour de France
items.summary: Tadej Pogačar started his quest for a record-equaling fifth Tour de France title when cycling's elite race kicked off in neighboring Spain on Saturday. But it was his top rival,...

items.title: Serena (knee) pulls out of Wimbledon doubles
items.summary: Serena Williams, the 23-time Grand Slam singles champion, has withdrawn from doubles competition at Wimbledon with a right knee injury, she announced Saturday.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
